story.text:
# ✨ Weave Cloak
**📜(source) → 🧵 → 🪡 → 🧥(role-published, name-concealed)**
*pallia · weaving · V28*

Weave source-layer artifacts (DIDs, VCs, schemas, chronicles) into the cloak — the publication-layer object that publishes the role and conceals the name.

> Position not value. Containment not attestation. Sameness of role published; the name kept.

*Keywords:* cloak · weave · publish-role · conceal-name · v28 · eight-properties
